text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest is here. As for Fuji
Kiseki...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's putting on a special magic show.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Tracen Academy's Fan Fest,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Are you ready to have a great time together on
this wonderfully special day?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fans
text_block_list.text: Yeees!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! I'm glad you're all so excited!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, let's liven things up with a pinch of spice!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let today's special program—by which I mean this
most extraordinary magic show—begin!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here, I have an enormous box and a lady of
peerless beauty—Hishi Amazon!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
P-peerless beauty?! The heck're you talkin'
about? And what's goin' on here?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now this shy but charming lady will enter the
box! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll do what?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, can you hear me? How are things inside
the box?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's dark as heck in here! What do ya think?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, my dear volunteer has no idea
what's going on! As for this box she's in...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll do a little decorating! This... and this... and,
how about this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki takes out some padlocks and chains,
wraps up the box, and locks it up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: H-hey, what's that noise?! What are you doin'?! Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And here's where the real fun begins! I have ten seconds to get her out of the box!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If I fail, we'll both drink a bottle of super spicy
hot sauce!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Excuse you?! You're gonna regret this once I get outta
here!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, what will become of my lovely volunteer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, if you could start a countdown for me,
please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Fuji Kiseki's encouragement, the audience
begins counting down.

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Ten, nine, eight!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? That's weird... I was sure this was supposed
to work...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You'd better not mess this up, damn it!

text_block_list.name: Audience
text_block_list.text: Five... four... three...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Ohhh, this is bad! What should I do now?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a snap of her fingers, the stage becomes
bathed in light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we can see clearly again, Hishi Amazon, the
box, and Fuji Kiseki have all disappeared!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The curtains of the magic show fall to the sound
of thunderous applause and cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you want to know the secret behind the
magic trick I did yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh, it's nothing! I just have the power to make
things disappear with the snap of a finger, that's
all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep trying to get her to tell me her secret, but
all she does is deflect my questions with an
amused smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Amazon, who was in the box, is now standing on the stage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the... When did I—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! That was a close one! How do you feel,
Hishiama? Not sick, I hope.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The sun is hurting my eyes, but, more
importantly...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Just what in the heck happened?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've confirmed the safety of the trick,
let's try it out for real!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Who shall be the next pony to have magic cast
upon her?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What the... Hang on, was I your guinea pig?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, a huge line leading to Fuji Kiseki's
stage forms.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how she did that! Fuji's like a real
magician!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! She held my hand when she helped me into
the box! I'll never wash it again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest is a resounding success, and
everyone leaves it pleased as punch!
